    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    O

    onCategorySelected(Category) - Method in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Updates the selected category when the combo box selection changes.
    onChangePinClicked() - Method in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Handles the "Change PIN" button click.
    onDeleteClick() - Method in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Handles the "Delete" button click.
    onEditClick() - Method in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Handles the "Edit" button click.
    onEnablePinToggled(boolean) - Method in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Handles the PIN enable/disable toggle.
    onLogExpenseClicked() - Method in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Navigates to the expense logging screen.
    onResetCycleClicked() - Method in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Handles the "Reset" button click in the Cycle panel.
    onSaveClicked() - Method in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Handles the "Save" button click.
    onStartCycleClicked() - Method in class ui.SetupScreen
    Handles the "Start cycle" button click.
    onUnlockClicked() - Method in class ui.LockScreen
    Handles the unlock button click.
